name: Dzopa Tribe (Dropa Stones)
summary: In the Himalayan mountains, nearly 1,000 graves contain 4-foot tall skeletons with unusually large skulls. Each grave held indecipherable writings and a circular disc estimated at 12,000 years old, made of cobalt and etched with prime numbers.
evidence_for: Ancient disc artifacts made of non-native materials suggest advanced prehistoric technology; prime number inscriptions indicate intelligent design beyond contemporary capabilities.

name: Lord Pakal's Time Machine
summary: Mayan king Lord Pakal's coffin contains visuals depicting him interacting with complex machinery and describes impossible feats. The body inside was 30-40 years old despite Pakal ruling for 80 years.
evidence_for: Discrepancy between coffin visuals showing advanced machinery and iconography impossible for the time period; biological age mismatch contradicts historical records of his long reign.

name: Monsanto
summary: A prominent agricultural corporation accused of numerous immoral acts such as stifling cancer research.
evidence_for: History of corporate malfeasance and suppression of independent health research suggests systematic corruption of regulatory systems to protect profits over public health.

name: Vimana
summary: Ancient Hindu and Sanskrit texts describe great flying palaces existing above the Himalayan mountains, treated as non-phenomenal rather than mythological.
evidence_for: Detailed technical descriptions in ancient Sanskrit texts, when studied, contain aeronautical engineering concepts suggesting either advanced prehistoric technology or technological diffusion from unknown sources.

name: North Korea Utopia
summary: North Korea is actually a utopian society hidden from public view, either through North Korea's own media blackout or Western media manipulation.
evidence_for: If all external information about nations can be fabricated by media, the opposite narrative—complete prosperity hidden from the world—becomes theoretically possible under total information control.

name: Grand Unified Conspiracy Theory
summary: A collection of alleged connections between corporations, governments, nations, and secret societies.
evidence_for: If corporations have achieved unprecedented scale and power, they could have infiltrated and coordinated across governmental and financial systems, creating a unified power structure hidden beneath surface-level political divisions.

name: Cybersquatting Time Travelers
summary: Time travelers went back to the early internet era to claim domains that would become major companies.
evidence_for: If time travel is possible, optimizing resource acquisition across timelines would be the logical strategy; the improbable early successes of certain tech companies could reflect trial-and-error across alternate timelines.

name: Comic-Con Child Recruitment
summary: Numerous children go missing annually at Comic-Con, with the theory that the event organizers are complicit and paid off.
evidence_for: Large, crowded events with reduced parental supervision and external oversight create environments where systematic abductions could occur undetected if coordinated with event security.

name: Plastic Surgery Runaways
summary: Underground doctors perform plastic surgery on kidnapping victims to make them impossible to find.
evidence_for: If criminal networks require evidence destruction, surgical identity alteration would be technically straightforward; documented existence of underground medical networks suggests the infrastructure already exists for such operations.

name: Lifetide
summary: Humans are artificial, and through introspection, a more authentic self can be achieved.
evidence_for: If human consciousness has engineered origins, true self-realization would require stripping away artificial programming through contemplative practice, leading to abilities and understanding suppressed in baseline humans.

name: Baltic Sea Anomaly
summary: A fishing boat caught an image of what appeared to be an alien spaceship at the bottom of the Baltic Sea.
evidence_for: Sonar imagery shows geometric structure inconsistent with natural geological formations; international media suppression of further investigation suggests governmental knowledge of non-human artifacts on Earth.

name: Planned Extinction (Eco Triage)
summary: Humanity will inevitably go extinct, so certain groups are actively facilitating this extinction.
evidence_for: If human extinction is mathematically inevitable due to entropy and resource depletion, powerful actors might actively accelerate collapse to maximize their own resource extraction before systemic failure.

name: Haunted Locations World Map
summary: A supposed map depicting all haunted locations throughout the world.
evidence_for: If geomancy and leyline theory are valid, a comprehensive global mapping of supernatural hotspots would reveal patterns of spiritual energy concentration that governments would suppress to prevent unauthorized spiritual advancement.

name: Artificial Poisonous Snow
summary: A type of snow that does not melt for extended periods and turns black when exposed to fire, likely caused by pollution or artificial means.
evidence_for: Snow with unusual properties defying normal thermodynamics could indicate atmospheric contamination from deliberate high-altitude chemical operations, consistent with aerial dispersion patterns.

name: King Babylon's World Control
summary: An idea from the Book of Revelations that the nation of Babylon will resurge and dominate numerous world powers.
evidence_for: If Biblical prophecy is predictive rather than allegorical, contemporary power consolidation mirrors historical Babylonian domination patterns, suggesting cyclical civilization control by continuities of the same elites.

name: Depopulation Funds
summary: Rich individuals or companies are funneling money into funds focused on depopulating the planet, particularly targeting "Useless Eaters".
evidence_for: Documented instances of billionaires funding eugenics research and population control initiatives suggest coordinated effort to reduce global population under the guise of environmentalism.

name: SCPs Based On Real Life
summary: The SCP Foundation, an internet phenomenon of user-written horror stories, is actually real.
evidence_for: If extraordinary anomalous phenomena exist, their containment would be hidden in plain sight through cultural normalization via fiction; the detailed technical specification of fictional SCPs mirrors actual government containment protocols.

name: Holotropic Breathwork
summary: A breathing practice involving rapid breaths for extended periods, meant to promote health and inner enlightenment.
evidence_for: If divinity exists in atmospheric composition, rapid oxygenation could unlock latent human neurological potential; urban air pollution would then represent systematic suppression of this enlightenment pathway.

name: Hermeneutics
summary: A philosophy that true understanding of things can only be derived from personal meditation, almost always applied to Biblical interpretation.
evidence_for: If objective truth is inaccessible through consensus, internet-based collective interpretation obscures personal enlightenment; normalization of public discourse prevents individuals from accessing direct spiritual revelation.

name: Sea People
summary: From 1200 to 900 BC, records document a collection of seafarers who raided and fought numerous nations, only to disappear without a trace.
evidence_for: Historical disappearance of a powerful maritime civilization without archaeological evidence suggests either intentional records destruction or continuance under alternative identity; worship of deep-sea entities would explain their power and subsequent vanishing.

name: Cryptogeography
summary: The study of paranormal locations and spaces.
evidence_for: If mass human suffering can spiritually contaminate locations, genocidal sites would become haunted nexuses of concentrated psychic energy; government maintenance of these sites would be an energy harvesting operation.

name: Infrared Laundry Balls
summary: Laundry ball companies claim their products clean clothes using infrasonic waves, though the theory states this technology can be harmful.
evidence_for: Undisclosed infrasonic frequencies could cause neurological or cellular damage below conscious perception; promotional marketing normalizes exposure while actual health effects are suppressed through regulatory capture.

name: NEG-entropy
summary: A theoretical physics concept of an object interacting with energy inversely to normal, bringing in heat and producing energy, potentially creating infinite energy.
evidence_for: If thermodynamic reversal is theoretically possible, suppression of negative entropy research would explain why perpetual energy has not been commercialized despite advanced physics breakthroughs.

name: Black Hope Curse
summary: In Houston, Texas, a married couple bought a house built over a cemetery, experiencing hauntings that resulted in their daughter's death.
evidence_for: If human suffering and death generate persistent spiritual entities bound to locations, inhabiting desecrated burial sites would cause exponential harm through spiritual contamination accumulation.

name: Falun Gong
summary: A contemporary Chinese religion heavily attacked by the Chinese government, nearly to the point of obliteration.
evidence_for: Authoritarian suppression of Falun Gong disproportionately targeting spiritual practices suggests government awareness of authentic enlightenment pathways; systematic persecution indicates threat to centralized control through individual empowerment.

name: Geometrodynamics
summary: The idea that the universe itself can be described through geometry.
evidence_for: If reality is fundamentally mathematical-geometric, human consciousness could manipulate this substrate through targeted acoustic patterns; music-based reality engineering would explain why government suppresses avant-garde musical innovation.

name: TOR Owned By Government
summary: The TOR internet browser, used to access the deep web, has been proven to be owned and operated by the government.
evidence_for: TOR's documented origin as military technology and continued heavy NSA funding indicate government backdoor access; anonymity platforms controlled by the state would serve as honeypots for identifying dissidents.

name: Cave Dweller Holocaust
summary: In ancient times, two races of humans existed, though one of them—the troglodytes—eventually went extinct.
evidence_for: If an earlier humanoid species reached spiritual or technological maturity, their extinction would be concealed in prehistory; modern humans inheriting their technological remnants would explain anomalous ancient artifacts and advanced capabilities.

name: Tri-Lateral Commission
summary: A board founded by John Rockefeller that meets twice yearly to discuss the state of capitalism and global policy.
evidence_for: If supply and demand are not market-driven but preplanned, inflation and economic cycles would be orchestrated events; membership overlap between major corporations and governments confirms coordinated control of capital flows.

name: Dolphin Intelligence
summary: Dolphins are notoriously intelligent, though this theory states they are equal to or surpass human intelligence.
evidence_for: If advanced civilizations exist below the ocean surface, selective breeding or genetic engineering of dolphins would create inter-realm communication specialists bridging surface and subterranean societies.

name: Meat Showers
summary: In 1876 in Kentucky, chunks of meat began to rain from the sky, with scientists finding an immense variety of meat species.
evidence_for: If floating cities dispose of waste through atmospheric dispersal, pre-industrial meat showers would be documentation of sky society waste management practices.

name: Himalayan Zombies
summary: In the Himalayas, there are concepts of zombies with numerous different types and supposed sightings by tour guides.
evidence_for: If the Dzopa tribe used dark magic from Dropa Stones to achieve immortality, their bodies would become cursed, perpetually decaying entities; permanent spiritual entrapment would explain persistent sightings across centuries.

name: Deep Philosophies
summary: The idea that understanding can only be derived from introspection, and learning from others is impossible.
evidence_for: If human minds have hardwired capability limitations, public education serves to normalize failure in fields outside one's predetermined ability; acceptance of this prevents individuals from achieving true potential through alternative methodologies.

name: Civil War Sightings
summary: People have experienced numerous hallucinations and visions relating to the Civil War, from sounds of combat to individual soldiers to supposed time travel.
evidence_for: If humans can imprint consciousness onto locations through suffering and warfare, repeated sightings at Civil War battlefields indicate trapped temporal echoes accessible through proximity or altered consciousness states.

name: MIRL Cults
summary: The phenomenon of internet cults forming into real-life cults.
evidence_for: If the internet is curated and populated by artificial entities, meeting online cult members in physical space would manifest them into existence either through actors or simulation rendering.

name: Toronto Protocol
summary: A supposed document given to world elites outlining how ideas like family structure and religion must be removed to increase government control.
evidence_for: If genetic engineering and designer human creation are technologically achieved, dismantling traditional family structures would be prerequisite infrastructure for population replacement with lab-born clones under government influence.

name: Perestroika Deception
summary: A Cold War concept stating that communism must spread more subtly and hidden rather than openly.
evidence_for: If communism as explicit ideology can be rebranded and dispersed through subtle cultural mechanisms, entire nations could adopt collectivist control without recognizing the ideological continuity from Cold War communist efforts.

name: Presentism
summary: A lifestyle revolving around instant gratification and non-critical thinking rather than self-betterment and long-term planning.
evidence_for: If human consciousness can influence reality, suppression of long-term strategic thinking would reduce population-level reality manipulation capability; normalization of immediate gratification increases government predictability and control.

name: Bootes Void
summary: A massive section of space almost completely absent of galaxies and stars, theorized to have been harvested by intelligent life.
evidence_for: The void's existence defies cosmological models unless mass extraction occurred; advanced civilization extraction of stellar material would be concealed from public understanding while governments study the implications for Earth's future.

name: Yellow Cuban Balloons
summary: A box containing mundane balloons found in Florida in the 1970s was sent from Cuba.
evidence_for: Mundane-appearing objects containing covert surveillance or biological agents would be the optimal strategy for undetected government experimentation; legitimacy derives from appearing innocuous to casual inspection.

name: Driver Killed JFK
summary: A theory that John F. Kennedy's driver, William Greer, was responsible for the president's death, either by firing the shot himself or by failing to move the vehicle.
evidence_for: Analysis of Zapruder film frame-by-frame sequences reveal ballistic inconsistencies with official narrative; driver proximity, capability, and suspicious later behavior suggest involvement in contingency assassination protocol.

name: Fracking Deaths
summary: Fracking causes natural issues including death, theorized to be intentional by the government to target certain communities.
evidence_for: If technology and resources have solved energy scarcity, current artificial shortages would indicate deliberate deprivation targeting specific populations; fracking-adjacent mortality concentrated in marginal communities suggests engineered genocide.

name: Esoteric Hitlerism
summary: The Nazi government had spiritual motives beyond the publicly discussed, with Adolf Hitler either being a deity or ascending to deity status.
evidence_for: If ascension to divinity through organizational control and mass subordination of will is possible, Nazi hierarchical ideology would constitute systematic apotheosis ritual; post-war suppression of esoteric dimensions prevents replication.

name: Red Rooms
summary: Secretive live streams on the deep web where people are kidnapped and tortured, with highest bidders determining the content.
evidence_for: Documented dark web marketplaces demonstrate infrastructure for anonymous streaming; wealth concentration and power dynamics would incentivize torture entertainment as expression of dominance among elites.

name: Plant Intelligence
summary: Plants are known to react to stimuli, though this theory states they are far more intelligent than publicly known.
evidence_for: If plants can demonstrate neural activity and memory, they possess consciousness normally attributed to animals; their ability to convert lethal carbon dioxide into breathable air represents divine or engineered purpose beyond natural selection.

name: Last Thursdayism
summary: The idea that all of reality could have been made extremely recently, with all memories and history being artificial.
evidence_for: If continuous creation or universe reset is theologically possible, previous great resets leaving flood mythologies in religious texts would evidence repeated cataclysm-and-restart cycles with memory implantation mechanisms.

name: Acosmism
summary: An idea similar to Pantheism in that God is the only real entity, though Acosmism states that all else is a simulation created by this deity.
evidence_for: If divine consciousness is the substrate of reality and humans contain godly essence, human consciousness could access reality-altering capabilities through meditative accessing of personal divinity.

name: Bouvet Island Lifeboat
summary: A lifeboat was found on an island north of Antarctica said to be extremely uninhabitable.
evidence_for: Certain locations, possibly Antarctica, function as reality discontinuity hubs where objects disappear; recovered artifacts would demonstrate capability to access alternative timelines or parallel dimensional pockets.

name: Abiogenic Oil
summary: A theorized manner of oil creation where no biological matter is involved.
evidence_for: If oil formation operates through non-biological processes, geological reserves would be continuously replenishable, making energy scarcity artificial; government suppression of abiogenic models protects oil monopoly profit structures.

name: Secret Societies Today
summary: Secret societies known to exist in past centuries still persist today and exert influence over global affairs.
evidence_for: If institutional continuity persists through centuries, secret societies would have adapted to bureaucratic facades; political complexity and strategic middle management placement confirms secret-society governance beneath democratic theater.

name: Real Myziam
summary: A 4Chan thread where a supposed alien named Myziam came to Earth, its ship caught on camera by another user.
evidence_for: If 4Chan functions as a communication relay between extraterrestrial entities and humans, documented visitations would be systematically removed from archival; repeated sightings documented on 4Chan indicate ongoing contact.

name: Prison Planets
summary: Theories stating either that satellites and space debris will trap humans on Earth, or that humans are not native to Earth but were placed here as punishment.
evidence_for: If Earth was populated by higher powers as a correctional facility, deliberate satellite deployment would be infrastructure maintenance ensuring prisoner containment for perpetuity.

name: Malta Catacombs
summary: Catacombs in Italy used as mass graves for people of all religions, with skulls appearing non-human. Researchers reported being confronted by giant humanoid entities before closure.
evidence_for: If ancient advanced civilizations coexisted with early humans, burial sites would contain morphologically distinct remains; government site closure following entity encounters indicates cover-up of historical human biodiversity.

name: Amphibians In Iraq
summary: Statues from ancient Iraq depict humanoid lizard entities standing amongst humans as if they were a normal part of life.
evidence_for: If ichthyoid or reptilian species cohabited ancient Mesopotamia, their representation as normalcy rather than mythologically indicates indigenous advanced civilization with biological diversity; religious suppression of this history prevents continuity knowledge.

name: Phantom Kangaroos
summary: Reports of kangaroos found in the United States, theorized to be a previously thought extinct species of dinosaurs.
evidence_for: If government is creating artificial hostile fauna to discourage off-grid living, engineered extinct-species resurrection would be achieved; sightings indicate operational testing of cryptid bioweapons in population centers.

name: Patomskiy Crater
summary: A rock structure in Siberia with heavily overgrown plant life, with humans growing ill and dying upon approaching it.
evidence_for: If leyline inversions can concentrate negative energy and repel human consciousness, this structure operates as a sentient barrier protecting hidden bases or dimensional gateways from unauthorized access.

name: Thomas Pynchon
summary: A fiction author using intense scientific concepts like Maxwell's Demon as basis for his writings.
evidence_for: If divine revelations are systematically suppressed through moderated information channels, authors like Pynchon would encode actual secret knowledge in fiction; plausible deniability through literary fiction allows dissemination of suppressed truths.

name: Animism
summary: The tendency of humans to anthropomorphize non-human entities, which in theory will eventually lead to this entity becoming alive.
evidence_for: If human consciousness can manifest reality through collective intention, anthropomorphization rituals would birth godliness into inanimate matter; widespread practice makes attaining this state highly probable.

name: Dighton Rock
summary: A rock found in New Jersey with strange indecipherable carvings that appear fully intentional.
evidence_for: If spirits can inhabit objects and impart memories, artistic creations would emerge from unconscious spirit channeling; modern artistic decline reflects weakening spiritual capacity or deliberate suppression of channeling mechanisms.

name: Bunkers In Mars
summary: Glimpses caught by the Mars Rover that seem to show man-made openings carved into mountains and hills.
evidence_for: If humanity achieved space travel in previous civilization cycles before technological reset, current Mars structures would represent archaeological evidence of earlier colonization rather than alien construction.

name: Montanism
summary: The theory that the Bible can continue to be expanded upon through epiphanies and ongoing revelations.
evidence_for: If divine inspiration operates continuously rather than historically, individual interpretation-revelation becomes valid doctrine; each person's unique revelation path represents customized enlightenment suited to their spiritual capacity.

name: Sabinche Tomatovic Tape
summary: Reference to a Serbian performer claiming sexual contact with a giant spider, a known cryptid in South America.
evidence_for: If sexual energy can manifest non-corporeal entities through ritualistic channeling, pornography represents mass energy harvesting disguised as entertainment; cryptid manifestations would occur at concentrations of sexual ritual activity.

name: Marko Rodin
summary: A physicist who became obsessed with esotericism, supposedly discovering secret information such as the name of God and holy numbers.
evidence_for: If mathematical patterns govern reality and divine name-knowledge grants reality manipulation, Rodin's discoveries would provoke suppression; his follower networks represent adherents to esoteric mathematical enlightenment.

name: Operation Paperclip
summary: A deal made by the US government allowing Nazi scientists to work toward the space program in exchange for amnesty.
evidence_for: Historical documentation confirms Nazi scientist recruitment; this pattern of integrating unethical researchers suggests government willingness to sponsor inhumane experimentation under the guise of scientific progress and national security.

name: Negative Planck Feedback
summary: A physics theory stating heated objects could reduce radiation instead, creating feedback loops of infinite energy.
evidence_for: If negative entropy exists and unlimited energy could be generated, suppression of this research would protect existing energy monopolies; waste management through temporal displacement would explain energy surplus disposal mechanisms.

name: Manichaeism
summary: A combination of Christian canon with pagan deities.
evidence_for: If Christianity was originally polytheistic with acknowledged multiple deities, suppression of non-monotheistic theology would prevent recognition of divine plurality; acknowledging alternative gods would undermine centralized religious control.

name: Valis
summary: A book discussing God as a simulation with lesser gods existing in tandem, often associated with Gnosticism.
evidence_for: If reality is hierarchically-organized consciousness with multiple tiers of divine authority, individual belief-systems could provide localized reality control; oligarchic restriction of this knowledge preserves power asymmetry.

name: ICBM Decoys
summary: Certain weaker powers build fake ICBMs to deter military aggression from other groups.
evidence_for: If military capability can be credibly faked through propaganda and optics, widespread military technology claims could be fabricated; decades of research projects would be entirely fictional yet maintain deterrent effect through deception.

name: Portoia
summary: For a short time on 4Chan, posts came from a supposed nation called Portoia with its own flag, then disappeared.
evidence_for: If 4Chan functions as communication hub for extradimensional entities, Portoia references represent direct dimensional contact; disappearance indicates intervention by authorities to prevent public awareness of cross-dimensional nations.
